programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: It's Sir Topham Hatt's birthday! He introduces Thomas to Winston - Sir Topham Hatt's new track inspection vehicle.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: A photograph of the engines is to be taken for a big billboard, but mayhem ensues when Diesel accidentally rolls in front of the camera and obscures Thomas!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Edward is chosen to deliver a new brass water wheel to the water works. There's trouble ahead when the proud engine decides to take the scenic route in order to show his friends his special delivery.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: It is carnival time on Sodor and Rosie is hoping to pull the special coaches. But when the job is given to Emily, Rosie decides to show her worth by attempting to shift the funfair herself...

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: The famous storyteller, Miss Marvel, gets ready to tell her tale of Proteus the Mystical Engine.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: When the Sodor Wishing Tree is damaged in a storm, Henry makes every effort to prevent some woodsmen from reaching it and chopping it down.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: The Fat Controller asks Thomas to show Hank, the new engine, around the island. Thomas doesn't take to Hank's brash personality and refuses to let Hank help him with his important jobs.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Toby thinks he isn't as important as the other engines and tries to make up for it by finding something special for the Fat Controller. But his search only causes confusion and delay...

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Emily is declared "excellent" by the Fat Controller and it goes straight to her head. When she is given an important job to do, she comes across a series of tricky situations.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Freddie decides to hold the winter party at the wharf as a special surprise for his friend Colin.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: When Thomas is asked to take a brave fireman to his award ceremony, Thomas decides he would like to be a hero too.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Duncan is upset when he hears the Percival twins are going on a hot air balloon ride for their birthday instead of their usual birthday treat - a ride with him.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: It's winter on the island and James is telling everyone he always knows best and never needs advice from anyone! When Hector tries to warn him about the bad weather, he decides to ignore him...

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Toby is very excited about leading the parade at the first Great Waterton festival, so when Thomas discovers that Flora is also leading the parade, Thomas is worried his friend will be upset.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Thomas thinks he can shunt faster than any other engine, so when Diesel challenges him to race backwards instead of working, Thomas is sure he can win!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Gordon is a very proud engine and thinks he knows the Sodor railway better than any other engine.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Thomas decides to go in search of the Man in the Hills as a surprise for Mr Percival's birthday party.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Thomas has been given the important job of delivering specially made blocks for the rebuilding of the Sodor River Bridge.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Percy needs to take Lady Hatt to her surprise party at the new bandstand.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: The Puppet Show has arrived on Sodor and Skarloey excitedly asks the Fat Controller if he can pull the puppet show special.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Thomas and Percy's friendship is in danger when Thomas is asked to take on Percy's favourite job. Thomas doesn't want to hurt Percy's feelings so tries to keep the news from his friend.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: It's the day of the Spring Party at the Duke and Duchess of Boxford's Summer House. Cranky teases Thomas that he can only carry light loads.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Thomas has to transport something called "The Lion of Sodor".

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Whilst covered in pink undercoat, James is asked by the Fat Controller to pick up his Granddaughter and take her to the Town Hall for her birthday party.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Thomas has a special job. He must take the Fat Controller to his special birthday party.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Thomas has to wear a replacement funnel while his own is being fixed.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: While Percy is at the Steam Works being repaired, Thomas is excited to be given the job of doing the mail run for him.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Alicia Botti, the famous operatic singer, is coming to Sodor! A new engine is also arriving today.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Farmer Trotter asks Thomas to collect some straw for the piglets which will be born soon. On the way, Thomas sees other things he thinks the piglets will like.

programme.title: Stiix and Stones
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks – and when they fail to make enough cash, the Ninja decide to steal it – but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Girls on Mission
programme.desc: Mia and Stephanie have to use a little horse power at the Sunshine Ranch. Things are getting mixed up on Andrea's first day on the job at Heartlake City Juicebar. Emma and Stephanie accidentally rent a scary movie and suddenly there are beasts everywhere... Stephanie has to face her fears when the class gets an 'Animal Kingdom & 'school assignment.'Olivia tapes a science show, with a little help from Mia's lemonade stand - and special effects! Andrea relaxes at the beach while Emma is hard at work at her lifeguard tower.

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

programme.title: The Hatching
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated. But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

programme.title: A Time Of Traitors
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity. Meanwhile, as the Vermillion Warriors go on a kidnapping spree, Lloyd struggles with his role as master-in-training and Nya does her best to reboot Zane, who was knocked off line in his first battle with the Vermillion.

programme.title: The Mask Of Deception
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers. The ninja find themselves scattered to the four corners of the kingdom. Cole and Jay are searching in vain for some sign of Master Wu. Nya fights injustice in the north, while Kai and Zane attempt to fend off an angry lava beast in the west. This leaves Lloyd alone in Ninjago City. He rushes to the scene of a heist at Borg Tower and finds himself up against a team of highly trained operatives led by the mysterious masked MISTER-E. Lloyd fails to prevent the heist and an ancient artifact, the MASK OF DECEPTION, is stolen. Lloyd apprehends one of the criminals but the others escape. Dismayed by his failure, Lloyd calls the ninjas back to Ninjago. The friends are reunited and hope for a little rest and relaxation. These hopes are dashed with the arrival MASTER HUTCHINS, a servant of the Royal Family of Ninjago, who has been sent by the EMPEROR to request their help. A new criminal gang, SONS OF GARMADON (SOG), is attempting to acquire three ancient masks called the ONI MASKS, which are rumored to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Gray Knight
programme.desc: Using his Stone to Life magic the Cloud of Monstrox turns Clay into a living, fighting, breathing stone fighting knight. But will Clay use his forces to fight for good or for evil? Does he have a choice? The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro are able to unlock the forbidden Power Shocking Scare and unleash an attack on the village of Bravington. Knights in their new vehicles rush to the rescue and are able to defeat him with a new Combo Power. In the heat of the battle, the Cloud of Monstrox sees the stone statue of Clay and zaps him to life! Clay is now turned, and is fighting against his friends. It is impossible for them to defeat him without destroying him for good. The Cloud urges Clay on. He attacks the Fortrex in order to get to Merlok. Robin in his Black Knight Mech is trying to stop him, but to no avail. Merlok 2.0 is left undefended. At the very last moment Merlok 2.0 unleashes a blasting spell that sends Clay far far away.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad And The Tightwad
programme.desc: Clay wakes up in the poor town of Nothing Hill which literally have nothing. Will Clay remember who he is and what he is fighting for. His friends try to help him, but Jorah Tightwad and his Bots get in the way. Clay as the Gray Knight wakes up far away in a place called Nothing Hill. A poor town where they literally have nothing. They harvest dust. Jorah Tightwad though has found that there is gold underneath the town. He convinces the confused Clay to help him put pressure on the poor townsfolk to give up their lots. This is an easy job for the strong Gray Knight. The NEXO KNIGHTS finally track him down and tries to convince him about who he is. But to the Gray Knight they are still his enemies, and a giant battle ensues in order to subdue the Gray Knight. At last, only Macy is left. When she begins to recite the Knights Code, some words and their meaning are able to get through the stone hard shell of the Gray Knight and the Evil that clouded him seems to disappear. Together they are able to return the ownership of the town to the villagers.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Chased Dreamers
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau, Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Girls on Mission
programme.desc: Mia and Stephanie have to use a little horse power at the Sunshine Ranch. Things are getting mixed up on Andrea's first day on the job at Heartlake City Juicebar. Emma and Stephanie accidentally rent a scary movie and suddenly there are beasts everywhere... Stephanie has to face her fears when the class gets an 'Animal Kingdom & 'school assignment.'Olivia tapes a science show, with a little help from Mia's lemonade stand - and special effects! Andrea relaxes at the beach while Emma is hard at work at her lifeguard tower.

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Aerialbots are thrown back in time to Cybertron's Golden Age.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron becomes infected with cosmic rust, a metal-consuming plague.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron has created an electromagnetic life-form. Although tiny and cute, he is also deadly and dangerous.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: After a failed attempt on Megatron's life, Starscream is banished to a deserted island.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: United as Bruticus, the Combaticons are virtually unstoppable.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Aerialbots Slingshot and Skydive disguise themselves as normal jet fighters.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Three high school students create more trouble than they can handle.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: As the Autobots celebrate their victory in the great war, they are attacked by mysterious, evil beings.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee faces off against the newest villain, Nanosec.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee and Bulkhead are having fun celebrating their first-ever Halloween with Sari.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead realizes that Sari's newest toy is really evil. Unfortunately, none of the Autobots believe him.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots go face to face with two new Decepticons, Lugnut and Blitzwing.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The kids try to gather the three Requiem Blaster minicons together.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The minicons want to be in charge of their own destinies, so the kids sneak the new team out of the base.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Enthusiastic young Sideswipe joins the team and Optimus tasks Hot Shot with training him.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Paradise Smurfed: Lazy dreams he is on Paradise Island and free from all the work Papa Smurf inflicts on him. His fantasy turns into a nightmare that sends him eagerly back to work once more.

programme.title: The Abominable Snowbeast
programme.desc: Brainy and his friends organize a journey to Ice Mountain to pick the rare snow flower for Papa Smurf. They meet a terrifying snow beast that befriends them, due to Smurfette's kindness, and helps them find the tiny flower.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sister Smurf: Smurfette has found a new friend, Laura, a six-year-old child whose parents live near the forest. Together, the two girls wander in the forest. But an old witch who lives in the forest catches them.

programme.title: Gormandizing Greedy
programme.desc: Greedy overdoes it. He's getting heavier and heavier until his weight puts him in jeopardy. The evil Gargamel is going to catch him... Can Greedy be saved by Papa Smurf?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette's Dancing Shoes: An evil imp gives Smurfette dancing shoes and then tricks her into promising to marry him. All her little friends rush to her rescue and Papa Smurf magically puts the dancing shoes on the imp. He is forced to dance off into the night.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sir Hefty: Sir Hefty discovers a wayward knight to help him defeat a dragon whose fire is threatening to destroy the forest. Alas, the knight proves to be a coward, leaving Hefty to prove just how brave he is when he sends the dragon away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sideshow Smurfs: Clumsy and Smurfette are captured by the wicked Bombast, who plans to exhibit them in his sideshow. Papa Smurf hurries to their rescue and using the bungling Gargamel for interference is able to rescue his Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Poet And Painter: Because they feel unappreciated, Poet and Painter leave Smurf Village and head for Storm Island, totally unaware that Gargamel is planning to trap them. Papa Smurf and his faithful volunteers rescue their friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Good, The Bad And The Smurfy: King Argon is a burly, boorish brute, but his wizard Mordain is worse still. He plans to use several Smurfs he has captured to steal all of the King's gold...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurf Who Couldn't Say No: Being asked to go to the Marsh to bring back the rare Foxfire is a great honor for a Smurf. But Scaredy Smurf is reluctant to confront the Marsh Monster so he sends the Smurf who cannot say no.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Winged Wizard: Determined to fly over Smurf village to catch a Smurf to take to the Wizard's Convention, Gargamel invokes his Book of Spells to help him. A series of funny flying machine mishaps occur and Gargamel is once more the laughing stock of the Wizard's Convention.

programme.title: The First Telesmurf
programme.desc: Papa Smurf pours a magic potion over the new Smurf-melon patch, which instantly grows and grows all over the village and forest. The Smurfs use the blossoms as a telephone, but before Gargamel can trace their voices, the flowers turn into melons and telesmurf is no more.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hats Off To Smurf: In his search for something new, Vanity dons a Gargamel-made magic hat that transforms his face into a mess. Through trickery, Papa Smurf gets the antidote from the wicked wizard and once more, Vanity is beautiful.

programme.title: No Time For Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy, Brainy, Clumsy, and Smurfette discover the hourglass of time in a cave and due to their bungling, time spins erratically out of control for all of the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Chief Record Smurf: Due to a wild experiment Clumsy is able to store endless knowledge into his memory. Gargamel captures him, trying to unlock Papa Smurf's invisibility formula, but at the last minute, Clumsy tricks him with the wrong ingredients.

programme.title: Good Neighbour Smurf
programme.desc: When Brainy's house burns down, he moves in with his fellow Smurfs and one by one they kick him out because of his meddling.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Little Smurf Confidence: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.

programme.title: Harmony Steals The Show
programme.desc: Harmony unwittingly signs a contract with Ghost Writer for a symphony that imprisons him in a ghostly nightclub for life! Papa Smurf demands a jury trial with ghostly jurors and a judge that finds Harmony innocent and Ghost Writer guilty of plagiarism.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hogatha's Hearththrob: Hogatha the witch promises Gargamel a magical whistle if he will introduce her to the warlock of her dreams. But they are both deceived by each other's trickery: Gargamel dresses up as the warlock, and Hogatha's magical whistle is only a birdcall.

programme.title: A Bell For Azrael
programme.desc: Gargamel puts a spell on a bell attached to Azrael's tail that will lead the cat to the Smurfs. Papa Smurf outwits him with a counter-spell that leads the wizard to Big Mouth instead of the tasty Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette For A Day: Hefty dresses like Smurfette to lure an enamored gnome, Piltkin, away from the Smurf Village. They burrow underground and meet a female gnome who falls in love with Piltkin who then casts Smurfette aside for his new heartthrob.

programme.title: The Rabbids are making a mess!
programme.desc: After discovering the joys of tennis, the Rabbids move the game onto an airport runway.

programme.title: Rabbids VS Technology.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get locked inside a supermarket for the night.

programme.title: The Rabbids are part of the family.
programme.desc: Three particularly stupid rabbids get banned from the rabbid headquaters and wander about the suburbs.

programme.title: The Rabbids are making a mess!
programme.desc: After discovering the joys of tennis, the Rabbids move the game onto an airport runway.

programme.title: Rabbids robbery.
programme.desc: The Rabbids follow a burglary.

programme.title: Rabbid Obsession.
programme.desc: The rabbids have decided to reach the moon... thanks to a big ladder.

programme.title: Welcome to the Rabbids!
programme.desc: A solitary rabbid who has no friend to fly with him to the Moon goes out on a search for one.

programme.title: The Rabbids travel.
programme.desc: The rabbids have collected several pieces of armor from the knights' castle.

programme.title: The Rabbids are locked up!
programme.desc: The Rabbids are shut inside a supermarket after closing hours.

programme.title: The Rabbids are arguing.
programme.desc: A Rabbid sticks a fake nose on his face, that changes the sound of his voice.

programme.title: The Rabbids rebel.
programme.desc: Thanks to the Teleporta-TV, the rabbids lay hands on a voodoo doll with strange powers…

programme.title: The Rabbids are fed up!
programme.desc: Amazed by a dog scratching himself, the Rabbids approach him, and get the dog's fleas.

programme.title: Rabbids experience.
programme.desc: In a laboratory, the Rabbids are subjected to tests designed to determine just how idiotic they really are.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules! Followed by Dance of the Seven Pies.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 'Fish Tale'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: With one backstage pass for a Ratbucket gig, Dennis and his friends pass themselves off as Ratbucket, only for the real Ratbucket not to be able to play at his own concert. Followed by 60 second Dennis and 'Bad Dad'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: Charity Bean
programme.desc: Bean is both cajoled by Irma and spurred by his own jealousy of the fund-raising super-star Declan.

programme.title: Wonderwell
programme.desc: A coming-of-age fairy-tale set between modern-day Italy and the fantastical realm just beyond, Wonderwell follows Violet, a naive and inquisitive 12-year-old girl, on a thrilling adventure that transforms her life forever.

programme.title: Air Bud
programme.desc: Buddy is taking his show to the beaches and getting into a whole new sport: beach volleyball! Life on the beach isn't as relaxing as it sounds. A rash of mysterious crimes has been plaguing the town and paw prints at the scene seem to point all fingers at Buddy!

programme.title: Rabbit Academy
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit meets Monsters University in the exciting, animated feature Rabbit Academy. This vibrant and colourful family adventure follows Max, the first city rabbit to be chosen in the master class for Easter Rabbits.

programme.title: Air Bud
programme.desc: With Josh off to college, Buddy joins the local baseball squad with his little sister Andrea. Once again, Buddy is a natural at anything with a ball! He is having a great season when suddenly, his puppies start to disappear from their homes!

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Barbie: Dreamtopia is an all-new magical, make-believe world imagined by Chelsea, Barbie's youngest sister. Join Chelsea and her puppy Honey as they swim through rainbow rivers with beautiful mermaids and fly through cotton candy clouds with fairies.

programme.title: Dogtanian and the Three Muskehounds
programme.desc: Dogtanian is an ambitious young swordsman who dreams of becoming a hero and joining the legendary Muskehounds. After proving his skills and earning their trust, he and the three Muskehounds must defend the King from the villainous Cardinal Richelieu's secret plot to seize power.

programme.title: Learning to Drive
programme.desc: Wendy is a book editor facing a marriage crisis. Darwan is a driving instructor from India with an abiding respect for tradition. When Wendy sets out to reclaim her independence, she hits a unique roadblock - she never learned to drive.

programme.title: The Right Kind of Wrong
programme.desc: "The Right Kind of Wrong" is the story of Leo Palamino (Ryan Kwanten), a failed writer-turned-dishwasher made famous for his many flaws and shortcomings in a blog called "Why You Suck," written by his ex wife.

programme.title: Bad Behaviour
programme.desc: Chaos ensues at a spiritual retreat when troubled former actor, Lucy (Oscar winner Jennifer Connelly), becomes obsessed with a fellow celebrity guest.

programme.title: Love Sarah
programme.desc: Three generations of women, led by Mimi will need to overcome grief, doubts and differences to honour the memory of their beloved Sarah, while embarking on a journey to establish a new bakery in Notting Hill, a place filled with love, hope and colourful pastries from all over the world.

programme.title: Mega Shark vs Mecha Shark
programme.desc: When a mega shark starts terrorising the waters around the U.S., the American government creates a giant robot shark to take it out. Starring Christopher Judge, Elisabeth Rohm and Matt Lagan (2014).

programme.title: Disaster Zone: Volcano in New York
programme.desc: The manager of a construction crew has to save New York when experimental technology causes a volcano to erupt under the city. Starring Michael Ironside and Costas Mandylor (2006).

programme.title: Meteor Storm
programme.desc: San Francisco is a target for waves of destructive meteors after a rogue comet breaks from its orbit. Starring Micheal Trucco and Kari Matchett (2010)

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner's deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: Frozen Ground
programme.desc: An Alaska State Trooper partners with a young woman who escaped the clutches of serial killer Robert Hansen to bring the murderer to justice. Based on actual events.

programme.title: Sleeping With Other People
programme.desc: Jake (Jason Sudeikis) and Lainey (Alison Brie) impulsively lose their virginity to each other in college. When their paths cross twelve years later in New York City, they realize they both have become serial cheaters.

programme.title: Stuck in Love
programme.desc: Three years after his divorce, acclaimed novelist Bill Borgens (Academy Award® nominee Greg Kinnear) is still obsessed with his ex-wife Erica (Academy Award® winner Jennifer Connelly), who left him for another man.

programme.title: A Haunted House
programme.desc: When Malcolm's (Marlon Wayans) girlfriend moves into his house, he soon discovers the love of his life is possessed by an evil spirit. Malcolm enlists the help of Father Williams (Cedric the Entertainer) to exorcise the demon from his girlfriend.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Out of the Furnace
programme.desc: When Rodney Baze mysteriously disappears and law enforcement doesn't follow through fast enough, his older brother Russell takes matters into his own hands to find justice.

programme.title: Cold Souls: Cold Souls
programme.desc: Paul is an actor who feels bogged down by his participation in a production of Chekov's play, Vanya.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A man from another world crash lands on Earth during the age of the Vikings.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Banished by the king, Hercules harnesses his powers and gathers an army to fight his way back to his kingdom.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter is all that stands between humanity and the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: Crossworlds
programme.desc: When a resistance fighter turns up in, Joe is drawn into a battle to rescue Earth from intergalactic raiders.

programme.title: Pennywise: The Story of It
programme.desc: Exploring the 1990 mini-series, based on Stephen King's iconic novel IT, this documentary tells a story heard by few and showcases a wealth of behind-the-scenes footage and photos seen by even fewer. From investigating the cultural phenomenon of coulrophobia (the fear of clowns) to Tim Curry's magical portrayal of the notorious clown monster, this story promises to dig deeper into the Pennywise phenomenon than ever before! Featuring interviews with many of the cult classic's key players, including director Tommy Lee Wallace and cast members Tim Curry, Seth Green, and Richard Thomas.

programme.title: Poster Boys
programme.desc: When broke Irishman, Al Clancy, mistakenly agrees to mind his smart-ass 10-year-old nephew, Karl, for a week, his job and home are placed in jeopardy. In a bold bid to save Al's unfulfilling but undemanding job as a poster boy, they steal the family camper-van, embarking on a madcap, impulsive postering tour across Ireland. But the unlikely pair soon discover it may be more difficult than they realised to survive a week in each other's company... An "Irish gem that will have you in stitches" (Film Ireland), this semi-autobiographical comedy from debut Director Dave Minogue received its world premiere at this year's Galway Film Fleadh. An independent production featuring a range of brilliant new Irish talent (and a memorable cameo from Boyzone/Corrie's Keith Duffy!), this festival favourite is a road-trip adventure with undeniable heart and an uplifting message at its core that families need to look out for each other no matter what circumstances they may find themselves in.

programme.title: Landmine Goes Click
programme.desc: Tense thriller starring Spencer Locke, Sterling Knight and Dean Geyer. Three American tourists are backpacking through the remote countryside of European Georgia when one of them gets trapped on an armed landmine. That seems to be a minor threat compared to the nightmarish happenings the rest of the afternoon will bring on however. A psychopath takes advantage of the tourist's immobility and brutally assaults the woman he loves.

programme.title: Last Girl Standing
programme.desc: Five years ago, a masked killer brutally murdered a group of friends. Since then, Camryn (Akasha Villalobos), the lone survivor, has struggled to reclaim her shattered life. Wracked with guilt and paranoia, Camryn leads a depressingly lonely existence until Nick (Brian Villalobos), a new co-worker, befriends Camryn and attempts to integrate her into his group of friends. Just when she might be ready to start a new life, Camryn's past comes back to haunt her. Can Camryn ever have a life again, or is she destined to be alone?

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: Barbara Thorson (Madison Wolfe) is a teenage girl who escapes the realities of school and a troubled family life by retreating into her magical world of fighting evil giants. With the help of her new friend Sophia (Sydney Wade) and her school counsellor (Zoe Saldana), Barbara learns to face her fears and battle the giants that threaten her world.

programme.title: Ravage
programme.desc: A raw revenge thriller starring Annabelle Dexter-Jones (Succession), Bruce Dern (Nebraska) and Robert Longstreet (Doctor Sleep). Harper, a young nature photographer on assignment captures a disturbing event of a man being brutally beaten in the woods. After reporting the incident to the local sheriff, she is soon captured by the culprits and taken to an abandoned farm in the woods to be tortured.

programme.title: Come to Daddy
programme.desc: Elijah Wood (The Lord of the Rings) stars in this critically acclaimed, genre-bending horror comedy thatll leave you shocked and in hysterics. After years of no contact, Norval (Wood) visits his estranged father (Stephen McHattie, Watchmen) and quickly discovers he has a shady past. Also starring Michael Smiley (Kill List) and Garfield Wilson (The Man in the High Castle).

programme.title: Level 16
programme.desc: A shocking dystopian thriller, mashing together the disturbing world of The Handmaid's Tale and Black Mirror to stunning effect. 16-year old Vivien is trapped in The Vestalis Academy, a prison-like boarding school. Reunited with Sophia who previously betrayed her, they embark on the horrifying truth behind their imprisonment. Soon running for their lives, they must save themselves or die.

programme.title: Rock-a-doodle
programme.desc: An iconic family favourite from legendary director Don Bluth and featuring the voice of Oscar Winner Christopher Plummer. A contemporary take on the classic fish-out-of-water story as a rooster, who is tricked in to leaving town to seek fame as an Elvis-style Las Vegas singer, teams up with a young boy and a group of barnyard animals on a magical journey to defeat the Grand Duke of Owls.

programme.title: Blue Moon Ball
programme.desc: A novelist returns to her hometown to finish her latest book. Can she help her first love save the town's historic ballroom from closure? Starring Ashley Newbrough and Eric Lutz. (2022)

programme.title: Charm of Love
programme.desc: Dr Turner, an Art Historian, must secure funding for her museum, so she goes to the Caribbean in search of an ancient artefact. Will she find the Lovers Stone, or will she find true love? (2020)

programme.title: Love Birds
programme.desc: A heartbroken man begins to take care of an injured bird whilst falling in love with a zoo's bird specialist. Starring Rhys Darby and Sally Hawkins (2011)

programme.title: A Love Yarn
programme.desc: Samuel heads to New Zealand to help sell his aunt's mill. Yarn shop owner Sophie has a plan that will save the mill, but can she convince Samuel? She soon discovers it's harder than it seems. (2020)

programme.title: In The Key Of Love
programme.desc: Music producer Jake returns home for his sister's wedding. Maggie, his ex, is the Wedding photographer. Will the romantic setting help reignite the flames?

programme.title: Departures
programme.desc: Skye (Maisie Williams), an impulsive teenager with a terminal illness, befriends Calvin (Asa Butterfield), a 19-year-old hypochondriac who is afraid of his own shadow.

programme.title: As I Am
programme.desc: One week of school remains for Kai, an aspiring writer, and his friends. How they spend this time will cost one of them their life and leave them changed forever.

programme.title: Love After Love
programme.desc: An uplifting story of love after loss. Following the death of a college professor, a wife and son explore new beginnings.

programme.title: W.E
programme.desc: The affair between King Edward VIII and American divorcée Wallis Simpson and a contemporary romance between a married woman and a Russian security guard.

programme.title: Under the Mistletoe
programme.desc: Starring Jaime Ray Newman, Michael Shanks, and Conan Graham. At Christmas, the tables turn on a selfless single mom when a local radio station takes over her love life after an innocent call from her 8-year-old son.

programme.title: Christmas Harmony
programme.desc: Harmony's pop star boyfriend breaks up with her right before the holiday season, but when she returns to her hometown she discovers the heart and music that her life has been missing.

programme.title: A Good Woman
programme.desc: The seductive Mrs. Erlynne (Helen Hunt) travels to Amalfi, Italy, hoping to win over married aristocrat Robert Windermere. But when Windermere's innocent wife Meg (Scarlett Johansson) hears of the scandal, she plots an elaborate revenge.

programme.title: A Christmas to Savour
programme.desc: Scarlett is a chef but every year her holiday dishes never sell. So this year, her best friend buys her a ticket for a holiday...maybe she will find love in a handsome rival chef from her past, and regain the Christmas spirit.

programme.title: A Christmas Princess
programme.desc: A prince from Europe comes to New York for a royal holiday dinner and falls in love with the chef that is planning the event.

programme.title: Off The Menu
programme.desc: An unlikely heir to a Mexican fast-food franchise goes ‘cuisine' hunting for the next culinary big thing he can ‘borrow,' and finds himself in a small, dusty New Mexican town where people come from all over to salivate over the culinary treats of a local female chef.

programme.title: All For Love
programme.desc: Jaded romance novelist Jo Payden has a tight deadline for her latest novel. Her last novel wasn't a big success so when her editor Diana recommends teaming up Colin, a Navy SEAL who also happens to be her brother, she jumps at the opportunity. Jo's enthusiasm quickly turns to dread as she realizes that Colin has signed her up for his Navy SEAL training Boot Camp.

programme.title: Beauty and The Billionaire
programme.desc: Addison gets roped into traveling overseas with her brother and his picky billionaire boss. But clashing with the billionaire is no vacation, until he starts to have a change of heart.

programme.title: Romance In The Air
programme.desc: After learning her marketing job is on the line, Eden returns to Lake Tahoe where she used to spend her summers growing up. Intending to relax and recharge so she can tackle her job again, she is surprised to find her childhood friend and sweetheart Riley is still living next door. She finds purpose in helping Riley propel his struggling hot air balloon tour company, and also finds herself drawn to him and their dear past. However, Eden sees Riley and Tahoe as temporary, while her life—and boyfriend—back home await her. She can't admit that she and Riley could have a future, even if that's exactly what she wants. When she's willing to take a risk for what her heart wants, her life will take off with her true love.

programme.title: I Won't Let You Go
programme.desc: Angela can't seem to shake the stalker who is ruining her life.

programme.title: Celebrity Sex
programme.desc: CA girl turns NY hedge fund VP, starts escort service, risks scandal.

programme.title: Iris Johansen's The Killing Game
programme.desc: Based on Iris Johansen's novel, this movie follows forensic sculptor Eve Duncan.

programme.title: The Preacher's Sin
programme.desc: Evan Tanner, famed preacher with a talk show and flawed family.

programme.title: I Won't Let You Go
programme.desc: Angela can't seem to shake the stalker who is ruining her life.

programme.title: Christmas à la Carte
programme.desc: When food correspondent Carly gets a shot at a show, she is sent to help Grant open a diner for a special.

programme.title: Fixing Up Christmas
programme.desc: A talented party planner must help a young CEO plan the Christmas party of the year to build his company.

programme.title: Eat, Drink and be Married
programme.desc: Billie helps save a wedding—and maybe finds love herself—in this charming romantic twist!

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: After being sent to Hell, Norman returns to Earth as a demon intent on summoning Astaroth to Earth.

programme.title: Smooch
programme.desc: A rakishly handsome "English Royal" comes to America for an arranged marriage, and ends up being mugged in San Francisco's Golden Gate Park and left with amnesia.

programme.title: Think Like A Man Too
programme.desc: All the couples are back for a wedding in Las Vegas, but plans for a romantic weekend go awry when their various misadventures get them into some compromising situations that threaten to derail the big event.

programme.title: Here Comes The Boom
programme.desc: A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches in order to raise money to save the music program at his school.

programme.title: Little Man
programme.desc: A short, baby-faced jewel thief masquerades as a baby to try to recover a stolen diamond.

programme.title: The Animal (2001)
programme.desc: A bumbling police file clerk takes a walk on the wild side when a mad doctor repairs his body with animal parts.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: Rolling Stone Magazine unwittingly hires a 15 year old aspiring journalist after reading an article he wrote for Cream Magazine. ALMOST FAMOUS is the hilarious and touching story of this intelligent young man's journey into the world of Rock-and-Roll as he tours with "Stillwater", an up-and-coming band struggling with their rise to fame.

programme.title: Hate your Neighbour
programme.desc: Ken wants justice for his brother Bill, who was killed by a notorious gunman named Stevens for a goldmine map. The gunman is arguing with gangster Malone (Horst Frank) about the map. A deadly cat and mouse game between the three men ensues.

programme.title: Billy the Kid Versus Dracula
programme.desc: Dracula arrives in the Old West, setting his sights on a young ranch owner. Her fiancé, Billy the Kid, is warned of the vampire's true nature but struggles to convince others. As Dracula tightens his grip, Billy must act fast to save his bride-to-be before it's too late.

programme.title: Deadly Trackers
programme.desc: Jeff sets out to murder each one of the five outlaws who robbed, raped and killed his poor sister.

programme.title: The Daring Caballero
programme.desc: Cisco learns that Pappy Del Rio, the town's leading citizen, is set to be hanged for murder. The Padre believes Pappy is innocent, so Cisco breaks him out and hides him. While on the run, Cisco encounters the Mayor, an outlaw he knows under a new name, and suspects he's the real murderer. Cisco sets out to prove the Mayor's guilt and clear Pappy's name.

programme.title: Kill the Wickeds
programme.desc: Good Samaritan drifter, Benny Hudson and a stranded woman, Jenny finds themselves being torture when they accidentally walk into an gang's hideout in a ghost town.

programme.title: Henry V
programme.desc: The King is persuaded by those around him to claim the Crown of France.

programme.title: A Challenge for Robin Hood
programme.desc: After being falsely accused of murder, Sir Robin of Loxley takes refuge in the untamed wilderness of Sherwood Forest where he stumbles across a group of outlaws. Although initially suspicious of the aristocrat's motives, the men are soon won over by his integrity and prowess and Robin transforms them into a formidable fighting force, stealing from the rich and giving to the poor. As word of his fame and valour spreads, a legend is born...The film recounting the oft-told tale of Robin and his merry band of outsiders. The notable difference is a concentration on Robin's hated cousin Roger instead of the usual Robin-sheriff rift.

programme.title: Kidnapped
programme.desc: David Balfour is a recently orphaned young man from a tiny Highland village and the true heir to the title of Master of the Shaws. His uncle Ebenezer has designs on the title so hires Captain Hosean to dispose of his nephew.

programme.title: That Hamilton Woman
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier and Vivien Leigh star as Lord Nelson and Lady Hamilton.

programme.title: Devil's Gate (Abduction)
programme.desc: Set in the small town of Devil's Gate, North Dakota, the film examines the disappearance of a local woman and her young son. Schull plays an FBI agent who helps the local sheriff search for answers.

programme.title: The Zero Theorem
programme.desc: A computer hacker's goal to discover the reason for human existence continually finds his work interrupted thanks to the Management this time, they send a teenager and lusty love interest to distract him.

programme.title: Here Alone
programme.desc: A young woman struggles to survive alone in the woods after a mysterious epidemic decimates society. Bleak, gritty, and teeming with fear, HERE ALONE tells a story of survival and emotional redemption in a post-apocalyptic landscape.

programme.title: Infinitum: Subject Unknown
programme.desc: In this mind-bending sci-fi, Jane must find a way to alter her reality before it is too late. Featuring Sir Ian McKellen.

programme.title: Acts of Violence
programme.desc: When a woman is abducted from a night club, it is up to two veteran detectives to find her before anything happens to her. Starring Bruce Willis (2018).

programme.title: The Whistleblower
programme.desc: High-tension drama based on the experiences of a Nebraska cop who served as a peacekeeper in post-war Bosnia and outed the U.N. for covering up a sex trafficking scandal. Starring Rachel Weisz (2010)

programme.title: A Murderer Upstairs
programme.desc: (2017) Taut thriller starring Josie Davis. After her stepdaughter witnesses a murder, Cindy tries to protect her. But as the truth unravels, is the greatest danger living under her own roof?

programme.title: A Stranger with My Kids
programme.desc: (2017) Thriller with Ashley Scott. When Karen hires Alex, a male nanny, she's just looking for help with her sons. But Alex is looking for a family of his own, and he'll do anything to get it...

programme.title: Abducted
programme.desc: (2006) Captivating drama with Sarah Wynter. The lonely wife of a prison warden falls for an inmate she believes is innocent and helps him escape, only to make a shocking discovery about his motives.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.sub-title: When Liang Shan Po Robbed the Poor
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.sub-title: A Death for Love, More Deaths from Greed
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.sub-title: The Bravest Tiger is First Killed
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.sub-title: The Traps of Love and Hate
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: Hard Luck (2006)
programme.desc: Three converging storylines about a drug dealer trying to go straight, a couple who are brutal serial killers, and a middle-age couple exploring their mid-life crisis.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: Al Pacino and Johnny Depp head an all-star cast in this brilliant gangland thriller about an undercover FBI agent who befriends a hitman to gain entry to the mob.

programme.title: Into The Sun
programme.desc: When a government official is killed, an American operative with experience in the Yakuza culture is brought into investigate.

programme.title: Nowhere To Run
programme.desc: Action star Jean-Claude Van Damme is an escaped convict hiding out in a widow's (Rosanna Arquette) farm. When a land developer tries to force Arquette off her land in order to complete a multimillion dollar real estate deal, Van Damme steps in to save the day.

programme.title: My New York Year
programme.desc: 1990s, New York City: A recent grad and aspiring writer lands a job as assistant to renowned writer J.D. Salinger's literary agent.

programme.title: JFK
programme.desc: John F. Kennedy in Dallas, Texas, in 1963. What he learns leads him to suspect that there is more to the story than the public is being told.

programme.title: A Memory In My Heart
programme.desc: Rebecca Vega doesn't remember anything of her life prior to waking up in a hospital eight years ago. Now that she and her husband Joe have begun trying to have a child, she has been plagued with headaches and recurring nightmares.

programme.title: Kill 'Em All
programme.desc: After a massive shootout, a mysterious stranger (Van Damme) arrives at a local hospital on the brink of death. Then, a foreign gang brazenly comes to the hospital to hunt him down.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: Last Looks
programme.desc: Last Looks is a pacy and star-studded homicide mystery set in the heart of Hollywood. Alistair Pinch (Mel Gibson), is an eccentric but successful actor who spends his days drunk living the high-life in Hollywood. When his wife is found dead he becomes the prime suspect in her murder.

programme.title: Savage Justice
programme.desc: Newly engaged Shelby John (Jack Huston) and Ruby Red want a fresh start after their struggles with addiction, but when Shelby discovers his beloved Ruby dead on their porch, he embarks on a vengeful killing spree of the dealers who supplied her.
